pageDescription: Calculate your savings growth over time with regular contributions and compound interest for financial goals and emergency fund planning

emergencyFund.title: Emergency Fund
emergencyFund.description: Financial experts recommend saving 3-6 months of expenses for emergencies

compoundInterest.title: Power of Compound Interest
compoundInterest.description: Regular contributions combined with compound interest accelerate savings growth

goalsBased.title: Goals-Based Savings
goalsBased.description: Specific savings goals help maintain motivation and track progress

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides savings growth estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual savings growth may vary based on account fees and changing interest rates

importantNotesList: Higher interest rates significantly impact long-term savings growth
Regular contributions are key to building substantial savings
Consider high-yield savings accounts for better interest rates
Automate savings to ensure consistent contributions

messages.enterInformation: Enter your savings information to calculate growth over time
messages.resultMessage: Your savings calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides savings growth estimates based on mathematical projections. Actual savings growth may vary based on account fees, changing interest rates, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized savings strategies and financial planning, consult financial advisors or banking professionals with expertise in savings products and individual financial circumstances.
